summary: Deliverable incomplete and doesn't meet stated requirements. Critical failures: (1) Action `checkout@v4` not pinned to SHA (lines 15, 20 in workflow) — violates actionlint & requirements. (2) Workflow references `matrix.test.ts` (line 20) but file not provided — task explicitly requires TDD with tests. (3) No integration test harness using `act push --rm` despite task mandate "ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT". (4) No fixture files referenced by `FIXTURE` env var (line 10). (5) Artifact upload just runs `ls -la` instead of uploading (line 35). (6) No `act-result.txt` output despite being explicitly required. Core logic in matrix.ts & cli.ts is reasonable (proper types, error handling, pure functions) but incomplete delivery without tests prevents validation. Missing ~40% of task deliverables.
